title.zh-TW: 文件攝入與 AI 節點萃取
title.en: Document ingestion and AI node extraction

body.zh-TW:
支援格式：`.md`、`.txt`、`.pdf`、`.docx`。萃取流程：

1. AI 依文件結構（標題、段落）切割成候選塊
2. 各塊被分類為 Content Type
3. 生成雙語標題與內文草稿
4. 提議候選 Edge（依語意相近與文件順序）

所有結果進入 **Review Queue**，不自動 commit。萃取節點的 source_type 預設為 `ai_generated`，人工無修改接受 → `ai_verified`，人工修改後接受 → `human`。每個節點記錄 source_document 與 extraction_model。
body.en:
Supported formats: `.md`, `.txt`, `.pdf`, `.docx`. Extraction flow:

1. AI segments the document into candidate chunks by structure (headings, paragraphs)
2. Each chunk is classified into a Content Type
3. Bilingual title and body drafts are generated
4. Candidate Edges are proposed based on semantic proximity and document order

All results enter the **Review Queue** — never auto-committed. Extracted node source_type defaults to `ai_generated`; accepted without edits → `ai_verified`; accepted after edits → `human`. Each node records source_document and extraction_model.
